name: destinclaude-inbox
description: Process notes and screenshots from Todoist, Drive, Gmail, and more

inbox-processing.description: Processes inbox items from multiple providers (Todoist, Drive, Gmail, screenshots)

encyclopedia-update.whenAvailable: Invoke the `encyclopedia-update` skill with the extracted facts
encyclopedia-update.whenUnavailable: Save facts to `~/.claude/inbox/pending-encyclopedia.md` with YAML frontmatter

journaling.whenAvailable: Queue rants to `~/.claude/inbox/journal-queue/` for the journaling skill
journaling.whenUnavailable: Save rants to `~/.claude/inbox/rants/` as standalone markdown entries
